data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Delray Beach, Florida, it was reported that the Zinc Oxide Market is experiencing growth, as revealed by MarketsandMarkets. This data suggests a promising outlook for the industry, with significant numbers indicating potential opportunities for various sectors.

data.title: Resolutions of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: Decisions were reached during the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on March 31, 2026. The meeting addressed several agenda items, resulting in significant actions taken. Key resolutions were made during the meeting in relation to company affairs. Shareholders gathered to discuss pressing issues and make crucial decisions. The meeting saw a turnout of a significant number of shareholders, with a high level of participation from key stakeholders. The outcomes of the meeting are set to have a substantial impact on the company's future direction and operations.

data.title: Klient PSA Introduces Hybrid Project Delivery -- Humans Lead, AI Agents Deliver
data.description: In Montreal, as of March 31, 2026, there are eight specialized Agentforce agents integrated into the Salesforce system to collaborate with human consultants. Each agent is designed for a specific area of expertise, ensuring thorough review and approval of all outputs before dissemination. This collaboration enhances the capabilities of Klient, the organization responsible for Klient PSA.

data.title: 4CE Announces Strategic Partnership with ELEMENT Engineering Group, Establishing First Platform in Its Growing Engineering Network
data.description: On March 31, 2026, in Greenville, South Carolina, 4CE Engineering Group disclosed a new partnership with ELEMENT Engineering Group, a Florida-based engineering firm. The collaboration aims to enhance cooperation within the infrastructure sector. ELEMENT Engineering Group, a reputable company from Florida, is marking its anniversary.

data.title: Boyer & Associates earns Microsoft designation for customer support
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Boyer & Associates revealed their achievement of Microsoft's latest Support Services recognition. This title is bestowed upon leading partners who demonstrate exceptional customer support. The distinction was introduced at Microsoft's Ignite conference in November.

data.title: THEON officially inaugurates the production facilities of THEON Belgium in Zaventem, expanding its European footprint
data.description: A substantial investment in the multi-million euros range has been made for the production of IRIS-C thermal imaging clip-on systems. This investment aims to enhance local industrial participation and establish partnerships with manufacturers based in Belgium.

data.title: Pizza's Top 100 Movers and Shakers: Marco's Pizza Ranks No. 2
data.description: Marco's impressive growth, culinary creativity, and strong leadership have earned them a top ranking. President and Co-CEO Tony Libardi was recognized as one of the Top 25 Executives. The company's continuous expansion, introduction of new formats, digital enhancements, and menu updates are paving the way for future success. Based in Toledo, Ohio, as of March 31, 2026, Marco's is making waves in the industry.
